001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.service.repository;
002
003import android.app.Activity;
004import com.google.android.libraries.identity.googleid.GoogleIdTokenCredential;
005import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
006
007public interface GoogleAuthRepository {
008
009  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signInQuickly(Activity activity);
010
011  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> signIn(Activity activity);
012
013  CompletableFuture<GoogleIdTokenCredential> refreshToken(
014      Activity activity, GoogleIdTokenCredential credential);
015
016  CompletableFuture<Void> signOut();
017
018  class SignInRequiredException extends RuntimeException {
019
020    public SignInRequiredException(String message, Throwable cause) {
021      super(message, cause);
022    }
023
024  }
025
026}
